<section_header_level_1><loc_46><loc_196><loc_168><loc_204>5.5 Electrical Characteristics</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_46><loc_206><loc_453><loc_220>over operating free-air temperature range (T$_{J}$ = -40°C to +125°C), V$_{IN}$ = V$_{OUT}$ + 0.5 V or 1.45 V (whichever is greater), I$_{OUT}$ = 1 mA, V$_{EN}$ = V$_{IN}$, and C$_{IN}$ = C$_{OUT}$ = 1 µF (unless otherwise noted); all typical values are at T$_{J}$ = 25°C.</text>
